Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase TylF/MycF family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=desmethyldescarbamoylnovobiocin + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = descarbamoylnovobiocin + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:36655, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:73955, ChEBI:CHEBI:73957; EC=2.1.1.285; Evidence={ECO:0000269|PubMed:14694473};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: S-adenosyl-L-methionine-dependent O-methyltransferase that methylates at 4-OH of the noviose moiety, the penultimate step in the novobiocin biosynthesis pathway. Novobiocin is an aminocoumarin family antibiotic that targets bacterial DNA gyrases. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:14694473, ECO:0000269|PubMed:15218104}.
